examples: She had a yen to travel around the world.
His yen for knowledge made him a lifelong learner.
Despite her yen to see him, she knew it was best to keep her distance.

hin.definition: Confidence in oneself and one's abilities
examples: सफलता के लिए, आत्मविश्वास आवश्यक है.
वह अपने आत्मविश्वास के बारे में बात करती है.
मेरे पिता ने मुझे हमेशा आत्मविश्वास से काम करने की सलाह दी.
